name: TormentNexus
description: TormentNexus AI control plane — persistent L2 vector memory, semantic tool discovery, imported sessions, and skill registry.
long_description:
TormentNexus is a local AI control plane with persistent L2 vector memory, semantic tool discovery, imported sessions, and a skill registry. It provides 49+ MCP tools including memory management, file operations, system control, and routing to 20+ downstream MCP servers.

Key capabilities:
- L1/L2 memory with scratchpad and graph extraction
- Semantic tool discovery across all connected MCP servers
- Session import, branch, and compaction
- Skill registry and management
- Code search and repo map generation
- Enterprise integrations (Jira, Confluence, DevOps)
